en_title: Ratatouille 2 Will Never Happen, Says Director Brad Bird
cn_title: 《料理鼠王2》永远不会拍，导演布拉德·伯德确认
subtitle: 雷米的故事到此为止
opus_summary: 布拉德·伯德确认《料理鼠王2》永不会拍，认为雷米故事已完结，皮克斯试探被拒。他将为《超人总动员3》编剧并可能再为衣夫人配音，该片由彼得·孙执导，正在推进中。

paragraphs.en: Don't expect Pixar's favorite rat to make a return, as director Brad Bird sees no potential in a Ratatouille 2 .
paragraphs.cn: 不要指望皮克斯那只最受欢迎的老鼠会回归，因为导演布拉德·伯德认为《料理鼠王2》没有任何潜力。

paragraphs.en: , Bird was asked if he thinks there will be a second Ratatouille movie. Bird made it pretty clear that he believes Remy's story is completed and there's nothing left to do with that world. He noted Pixar has tried to nudge him into making a sequel, but he remains firm in his decision to leave it alone.
paragraphs.cn: ，伯德被问及是否觉得会有《料理鼠王2》。他明确表示，他认为雷米的故事已经完结，那个世界不再有什么可挖掘的空间。伯德提到，皮克斯曾试图劝说他制作续集，但他依然坚决决定不再碰这个系列。

paragraphs.en: "No, I don't," said Bird. "They've made little feints towards that to see how I would react. They'll, like, crack a joke, but the joke will be a little bit serious, like, 'Would you?' And I'm like, 'No, we told that story.' Any time you do something that ends up connecting with people, they automatically think, 'How about another?' People have mentioned it about The Iron Giant, which is hilarious to me because the film didn't succeed at all in its initial release. It's caught up in time, but what would you do to follow that up? He's lumbering around, still undiscovered? In other words, to me, that story is told."
paragraphs.cn: 「不，我不打算拍，」伯德说。「他们试探过几次，想看看我的反应。他们会开个玩笑，但玩笑里藏着几分认真，比如‘你真不拍吗？’我就回：‘不，那个故事已经讲完了。’只要你的作品打动了观众，人们就会自动冒出念头：‘再来一部怎么样？’《钢铁巨人》也有人这么提过，但我觉得特别好笑，因为这电影刚上映时根本谈不上成功。它靠时间慢慢翻盘，可续集能拍什么？让他还在某处晃晃悠悠地藏着没被人发现？换句话说，对我来说，那个故事已经讲完了。」

paragraphs.en: Bird did say he's open to revisiting his superhero franchise, The Incredibles, however. Pixar is indeed moving forward with The Incredibles 3 , which will be helmed by Elemental director Peter Sohn, but Bird will be penning the script. Bird also voiced Edna Mode, a fashion designer who creates the supersuits for the various heroes, so don't be surprised if he returns to his voice role, too.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，伯德确实表示他愿意重新审视他的超级英雄系列《超人总动员》。皮克斯正在推进《超人总动员3》，由《疯狂元素城》导演彼得·孙执导，但伯德将负责撰写剧本。伯德还曾为设计师角色衣夫人配音——她在片中为各路英雄制作超级战服——所以如果他再度回归配音，也不足为奇。

paragraphs.en: Bird's commitment to not continuing the story of Ratatouille may strike some as surprising. Pixar just released Toy Story 5 and, although it is performing very well , there's a looming feeling that the franchise has overstayed its welcome. Some feel that Toy Story 3 was the perfect send-off for Woody, Buzz, and the rest of the gang, but Pixar has continued to push the series forward. Of course, Disney and Pixar could probably make another Ratatouille without Bird, but they'd risk the chance of not only making a lesser film, but also damaging their relationship with a respected creative.
paragraphs.cn: 伯德坚持不为《料理鼠王》续写故事的决定，可能会让一些人感到意外。皮克斯刚推出《玩具总动员5》，尽管票房表现不错，但系列早已过了受欢迎期的感觉仍然挥之不去。部分人认为《玩具总动员3》才是对胡迪、巴斯光年等伙伴最完美的告别，皮克斯却继续往前推进。当然，迪士尼和皮克斯大可在没有伯德的情况下再拍一部《料理鼠王》，但这么做不仅要冒着拍出劣作的风险，还可能损害与一位备受尊敬的创作者之间的关系。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter @Cade_Onder上找到他。
